sections.title: Why Memory Matters: Context Is Changing
sections.content: LLM evaluations show that real context ability involves more than retrieval. It requires multi-hop reasoning, aggregation, and sustained coherence as context length scales.

sections.title: • Multimodal inputs and structured traces
sections.content:
• Multimodal inputs require joint reasoning over diagrams and screenshots.
• Structured traces show that agents increasingly operate over executable context.
